caption: A man with glasses, a bow tie, and suspenders wears a large, gray, pointed wig and headphones while speaking into a microphone in a studio. He is positioned in front of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs. To his right, a white binder is visible. A microphone stands in the foreground, and on-screen logos appear on both the left and right sides of the frame. The text on the left reads "PODCAST" below a stylized logo, while the text on the right says "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, though his facial expressions shift slightly as he speaks, and he moves his right hand, which is partially visible near the bottom of the frame. The background and equipment remain static as the man continues his delivery.
